ksa_text: Skill in developing AI system documentation and technical specifications, including creating model cards, system cards, datasheets, documenting system context and intended use, and producing documentation meeting regulatory compliance standards for EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

top_anchors.element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-005 (AI Governance/Skill) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.629. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.629.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, AI Governance, composite 0.629. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of AI Governance (composite 0.629)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance at ~12% market presence. AI governance ownership is not a standard ATE requirement at IC/senior IC. Exclusion consistent with role-level scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: KSA AG-S-005 (AI Governance/Skill) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.629. Highest framework: NIST AI RMF at 0.629.
